name: wan2gp-desktop
description: Desktop launcher for Wan2GP — install, update, maintain and run Wan2GP with hardware-aware setup

scripts.release:win: npm --no-git-tag-version version 2.1.4 && git add -A && git commit -m "v2.1.4" && git tag v2.1.4 && git push origin main --tags && npm run publish:win
